name: Suspicious Invocation of Microsoft Workflow Compiler
description: Detects the invocation of Microsoft Workflow Compiler (Microsoft.Workflow.Compiler.exe), a tool that can be abused by attackers to compile and execute arbitrary code for evasion. Legitimate use is rare in most environments.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows event ID for process creation (e.g., Sysmon Event ID 1 or Security Event ID 4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was created, which should be 'Microsoft.Workflow.Compiler.exe'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute Microsoft.Workflow.Compiler.exe, including any XML file arguments.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
